# AI Business Toolkit by Beorns Co

> Practical AI guides, prompts, and playbooks for small and medium businesses.

AI Business Toolkit helps SME owners (10-200 employees) adopt AI without consultants, jargon, or big budgets. Three core products plus a free email course.

## Products

### AI Adoption Starter Kit (€27)
37-page guide to identifying AI opportunities and building your first AI workflow. Includes assessment framework, ROI calculator, and AI policy template.
https://beornsco.github.io/ai-starter-kit/

### AI Prompt Library for Business (€19)
200+ copy-paste AI prompts organized by department: Marketing, Sales, HR, Operations, Finance, Customer Service. Works with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.
https://beornsco.github.io/ai-prompt-library/

### AI Automation Playbook for SMEs (€39)
170-page playbook with 12 step-by-step automation guides for real business processes: email, invoicing, reporting, scheduling, customer service, and more.
https://beornsco.github.io/ai-automation-playbook/

### Complete Bundle (€69)
All three products together. Save €16.
https://beornscout.gumroad.com/l/fabnse

## Free Resources

### 5 Days to Your First AI Quick Win (Free Email Course)
A free 5-day email course that helps your team find and execute their first AI project in one week.
https://beornsco.github.io/ai-course/

### Blog
19 practical articles on AI adoption for small businesses, covering strategy, tools, prompts, automation, HR, sales, marketing, and more.
https://beornsco.github.io/blog/
